name: pictag
author: Cristian Militaru
description: Local AI image renamer and organizer

scripts.bump: node -e "const v=process.argv[1]; if(!v){console.error('Usage: npm run bump <version>'); process.exit(1);} require('child_process').execSync('npm version '+v+' --no-git-tag-version', {stdio:'inherit'}); const fs=require('fs'); const t='tauri.conf.json'; const d=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(t,'utf8')); d.version=v; fs.writeFileSync(t,JSON.stringify(d,null,2)+'\r\n'); require('child_process').execSync('git add package.json package-lock.json ' + t); require('child_process').execSync('git commit -m \"v' + v + '\"'); console.log('Tauri app version updated and committed to ' + v);"
scripts.release:check-versions: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const pkg = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')).version; const tauri = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('tauri.conf.json', 'utf8')).version; if (pkg !== tauri) { console.error(`Version mismatch: package.json=${pkg}, tauri.conf.json=${tauri}`); process.exit(1); } console.log(`Version OK: ${pkg}`);"
scripts.release: npm run release:check-versions && node -e "const { execSync } = require('child_process'); const fs = require('fs'); const v = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json', 'utf8')).version; execSync('git push', { stdio: 'inherit' }); execSync('git tag v' + v, { stdio: 'inherit' }); execSync('git push origin v' + v, { stdio: 'inherit' });"
